phaseC.method: ISOLATED free-space (Hockney) Poisson solve (physical u->0, no periodic images) + EXACT ONE-SIDED discrete face flux (discrete divergence theorem for the 7-point Laplacian; central differences do NOT give it).
phaseC.periodic_FD_symbol_artifact: the periodic (zero-mean) FD-symbol solve carries a charge-NEUTRALIZATION background => face flux NOT flat (spread 8.9%, ~1.7% off) -> a TRUE ISOLATED method is REQUIRED (validates Charles).
phaseC.verdict: PASS (rigorous): clean positive local mass M_N=2E4 confirmed by an INDEPENDENT exact discrete face flux under true isolated BC, plateau-flat to 0.05% (0.002% at R=3.34).
